apps.name: Hello (wasi:http)
apps.description: Minimal wasi:http component that returns a greeting. Smoke-test app.

apps.name: LLM Chat (SmolLM2-135M)
apps.description: A small LLM compiled into the app: SmolLM2-135M-Instruct (ONNX, 4-bit weights) plus its tokenizer and a self-contained web chat UI, generating on the GPU through wasi-nn. GET / serves the chat page; POST /chat streams tokens over server-sent events (KV-cache decode, greedy sampling with repetition penalty). Requests pin target=gpu|cpu or default to gpu with a reported cpu fallback. 135M parameters: quick, tiny and frequently wrong - it demos the platform's GPU inference path, not model intelligence.

apps.name: NN Demo (wasi-nn)
apps.description: wasi-nn smoke test and debugger: runs a tiny baked-in ONNX graph through the host's ONNX Runtime. GET / tries the GPU (CUDA) and reports a CPU fallback; ?target=gpu|cpu pins the execution target. /ping answers without touching wasi-nn; /progress dumps per-stage markers (written to /data before every wasi-nn call), so a hung inference names the exact stage it died in.
